description: Deterministic parser-layer contract corpus for regex embedded code blocks. This corpus proves opaque payload capture, balanced-brace handling, and quoted-string shielding without claiming language-runtime validation.

cases.name: plain_opaque_generic_payload
cases.description: Untagged code block is accepted as opaque generic payload.

cases.name: lua_source_body_payload
cases.description: Lua-tagged code block is accepted as opaque source-body payload.

cases.name: javascript_alias_source_body_payload
cases.description: The javascript alias is accepted alongside js.

cases.name: balanced_braces_inside_opaque_payload
cases.description: Balanced nested braces are preserved structurally inside opaque payloads.

cases.name: double_quoted_string_shields_braces
cases.description: Double-quoted strings shield close braces structurally inside opaque payloads.

cases.name: single_quoted_string_shields_braces
cases.description: Single-quoted strings shield close braces structurally inside opaque payloads.
